summary_en: Tiger and Lion investment partnerships' tender offer for all 467,099 units of Sankei Real Estate Investment Corporation failed on 18 May 2026 due to insufficient bids falling below the 247,563-unit minimum threshold.
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Tender Offer for Investment Units of Sankei Real Estate Investment Corporation (Security Code: 2972) by Tiger Investment Business Limited Liability Partnership and Lion Investment Business Limited Liability Partnership
translation_en_brief: On 18 May 2026, a tender offer by Tiger Investment Business Limited Liability Partnership and Lion Investment Business Limited Liability Partnership for all investment units of Sankei Real Estate Investment Corporation (Tokyo Stock Exchange REIT market, code 2972) concluded unsuccessfully. The offer, which commenced on 7 January 2026, targeted up to 467,099 units (the entire issued unit count as of 31 August 2025) with a minimum threshold of 247,563 units. The bidders intended to each acquire 50% of the outstanding units. The tender offer failed because the total number of units tendered fell below the mandatory minimum floor of 247,563 units, triggering automatic non-execution of all purchases. As a result, Sankei Real Estate Investment Corporation will maintain its listing on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and continue operations, with future strategic direction to be announced separately.
